narrative:
Precinct Brunswick City 2-E (precinct in Medina County) has 726 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
